hacks.title: Ragawise
hacks.subtitle: Raga recognition & visualization
hacks.description: Real-time raga recognition from audio using pitch class profiles and machine learning. Identifies the raga being performed and visualizes melodic patterns live. Built at HAMR 2015 (Hacking Audio and Music Research).

hacks.title: Hindify
hacks.subtitle: Hindustani style transfer
hacks.description: Transforms Western pop songs into Hindustani classical style by applying raga-based melodic transformations — converting Western scales to raga scales and adding ornaments characteristic of Indian classical music. Built at EchoNest Hack Day 2013.

hacks.title: Sawaal-Jawaab
hacks.subtitle: Interactive Hindustani call-and-response
hacks.description: A musical game inspired by the Sawaal-Jawaab tradition in Indian classical music. Players sing or play a melodic phrase and the system responds with a melodic answer using pattern matching. Built at HAMR 2015.

hacks.title: Hodorizer
hacks.subtitle: Game of Thrones audio hack
hacks.description: Replaces all speech in any audio/video with Hodor's iconic single-word vocabulary while preserving the original prosody, rhythm, and emotional tone using voice conversion techniques.

hacks.title: Music Spaghetti
hacks.subtitle: Infinite music loop generator
hacks.description: Essentia-powered implementation of the Infinite Jukebox concept — analyzes a song's beat structure to find perceptually similar segments and creates an endlessly recombining loop that always sounds musical.

hacks.title: YIN.js
hacks.subtitle: Pitch detection in the browser
hacks.description: JavaScript implementation of the YIN pitch detection algorithm for real-time fundamental frequency estimation — pitch tracking directly in the browser with no server-side processing.

projects.title: Riyaz
projects.subtitle: AI music practice app · MusicMuni Labs
projects.description: AI-powered practice app for Indian classical music. Provides real-time feedback on pitch accuracy, tala adherence, and raga grammar. Co-founded MusicMuni Labs to build and commercialize this. 1M+ installs.

projects.title: Dunya
projects.subtitle: CompMusic music corpus explorer
projects.description: Web platform for exploring and analyzing the CompMusic music corpora — large collections of annotated recordings across Hindustani, Carnatic, Makam, Beijing opera, and Andalusian musical traditions. Built at MTG, UPF.

projects.title: Saraga
projects.subtitle: Open datasets for Indian art music research
projects.description: Large-scale open dataset for research on Carnatic and Hindustani music, featuring multitrack audio, melodic annotations, and metadata. Published in Empirical Musicology Review 2021.

projects.title: CompMusic
projects.subtitle: ERC research project on world music MIR
projects.description: European Research Council funded project at MTG, UPF for computational analysis of non-Western music traditions. Contributed to tonic identification, raga recognition, melodic similarity, and corpus tools for Hindustani and Carnatic music.

projects.title: Take-1
projects.subtitle: Music practice & recording tool
projects.description: Practice companion for musicians that records and analyzes musical phrases, helping students compare their performances against reference recordings and track improvement over time.
